steps.title: Use the technology contrast
steps.content: The text contrasts hoards discovered since the 1960s, which benefited from detection technology, with earlier hoards that did not. Without those tools, older discoveries were more likely to happen by chance during ordinary ground disturbance.

steps.title: Reject content guesses
steps.content: Choice A and Choice C invent details about what the hoards contained. Choice D says the discoveries occurred before the ground was disturbed, but the point is that older hoards were more likely found only after accidental disturbance. The answer is B.
